name: The Red Beret 红色贝雷帽
short_description: This is a story that happened during World War II. As the only survivor of the mission, you need to survive on the island and eliminate the Super Mutants and Nazi Germans
detailed_description:
Yes, this open world game only costs a few yuan and includes multiple gameplay options: build, collect, explore, sneak, shoot zombies, attack the German army, and even control the German missile attack warship on the top of the snowy mountain. You can even command AI teammates to assist you in completing a large amount of collection work and assist you in attacking enemies. This game adopts a unique optimization algorithm, even if your computer configuration is very low, you can fully play on the beach, snow, and forest of the game. There are many types of animals in the game, including marine animals, land animals, birds, amphibians, and even mice and spiders in the cave have been meticulously designed

AI teammate has been launched and can assist you in collecting minerals and plants, as well as attacking enemies

The Nazis secretly conducted human experiments on Jews and prisoners of war, and plunged mutants into war. The UK sent a paratrooper team to secretly infiltrate the experimental island to eliminate the super mutants there. Unexpectedly, the plane was shot down by the enemy's Anti-aircraft gun. As the only survivor, Damon is about to complete this seemingly impossible task

The first thing to do is to survive and resist the attacks of the mutants scattered on the island in the first few days
Building bases and weapons with materials obtained through felling trees, mining stones, and collecting resources
Collecting fruits or planting crops to supplement nutrition for the body by capturing prey

There are many types of resources on the island, but you still need to be patient in collecting them

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*, Spanish - Spain, Thai
*languages with full audio support
